item.title: Gold rallies as Fed signals rate cut pause
item.description: Gold prices surged past $3,290/oz as the Federal Reserve signaled caution.

item.title: China increases gold reserves for third month
item.description: China's central bank added to its gold reserves again amid trade tensions.

item.title: PAXG vs XAUT spread widens on exchanges
item.description: Traders spotted a growing spread between tokenized gold products.
